payload.answer: Stored as a contextual note about the article and its mock summary; no higher-confidence factual claims were added beyond the provided input.

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to a specific article URL and a mock fetched summary, but no existing entity is provided to merge with.

payload.intent: Evaluate whether to store the provided article context as a durable memory card.

relationships.object: useful for thinking about knowledge graph memory design

memory_cards.statement: The article at https://example.com/ai-memory is described as useful for thinking about knowledge graph memory design.
The mock fetched article says graph memory helps agents preserve relationships and that provenance and update semantics are needed.

details: Captured the article URL as context.
Preserved ambiguity by marking confidence as medium.
Avoided inventing any claims beyond the provided text.

repair_options: If needed, add a separate memory card for the article title once verified.
If the article content is later fetched from a real source, replace the mock summary with source-backed facts and provenance.
